metadata.name: Disintegrate The Ensnared #5
metadata.description:
“To reveal what lies within, one must clear their ensnared thought as best as they could.”

 This piece was inspired by human's possibility of breaking their barriers and pushing their boundaries to bring out their potential.

Move your mouse from up to down to interact with the piece.

Press ’s’ on the live mode to save the screen capture.

Made using Hydra (https://hydra.ojack.xyz/)

Rangga Purnama Aji, 2022
https://linktr.ee/ranggapuraji

metadata.name: Obscured Striations #1
metadata.description:
Inspired by the Indonesian "kain lurik" patterns by mixing various color combinations and add some lights to give a calming dim impression.

Press ’s’ on the live mode to save the screen capture.

Made using Hydra (https://hydra.ojack.xyz/)

linxirwengi - 2022

metadata.name: grey fungi wisdom #1
metadata.description:
~ get close, stay close, survive
individual automatons forming a community
from the grey, fungi wisdom

's' to download

April 2022 - ñan (@Alt126nan)

metadata.name: Glitch Capsule #1
metadata.description:
An attempt to visualize the leak of contained glitches within the dissolved expanding capsule.
______________________________________________________________

///INTERACTIVITY///
Read the instructions below and do it after opening the live mode.

1. Press the "c" button on your computer keyboard to save a frame from your minted iteration.

2. The animated visual will always behave according to the screen's resolution (e.g., the visual in 1:1 view and the live mode will show differently but still give the same impression of the minted iteration). To adjust the piece resolution, you need to set your browser first and then reload it every time you want to capture the screen view.
______________________________________________________________

Created using Hydra live coding visual library

"Glitch Capsule" copyright CC-BY (Attribution)
by Rangga Purnama Aji, 2024.

https://linktr.ee/ranggapuraji

metadata.name: Strata #264
metadata.description:
A generative series inspired by the work of Vera Molnár, Strata explores the diversity that can come from one shape - the simple rectangle.

With 16 properties and ~600 palettes, I hope that each mint offers something unique and special.

Exploration is fully open and will be left open post-mint :)

metadata.name: Refusing Withdrawal #1
metadata.description:

metadata.name: GPT-3 and me (free companion mint) #389
metadata.description: Free companion piece to my first Fx(text) article! I have never coded a single line of Javascript in my entire life, yet GPT-3 was able to write the code for this work via my inputs. To read the full article visit: https://www.fxhash.xyz/article/gpt-3-and-me:-a-generative-coding-study

metadata.name: Fx(hash) Generative Birthday Candle #148
metadata.description:
This is my contribution to #fxhashturnsone.
100% of primary proceeds will go to Processing Foundation.
Royalties split 50/50.
Renders best on Chrome.

Made with code and ❤️ by pifragile.
